spec_match.rationale: Correctly couples anchors to horizontal scroll-snap slides via target groups.

interactive.rationale: Features horizontal scrolling gallery that updates active tags automatically on scroll or clicking.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches ChromeStatus entries and spec definitions of target highlight sets.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes beautiful CSS injection polyfills for browsers without scroll-target-group.

design_system.rationale: Gorgeous layout grid with custom borders and colors.

summary: A superb horizontal pager demonstrating :target-current on anchors, completely decoupled from scripting.
